Bash(git commit -m "feat: complete immersive landing page redesign with scroll animations

🎯 HERO LAYOUT: animation top 65vh + text centered below
• Split hero section: BlueprintAnimation in top area, text below without overlap
• Removed bottom-left positioning for centered layout
• Added staggered hero text animations with CSS keyframes fadeInUp
• Enhanced hero fade gradient for smooth section transition

🎨 SEAMLESS VISUAL FLOW: removed ALL borders + continuous dark canvas
• Deleted all borderTop, borderBottom, border separators between sections
• Implemented zebra shimmer pattern: Features/Roles rgba(255,255,255,0.015), How-it-works/Email transparent
• Updated navbar to remove borders, kept backdrop blur only
• Achieved one continuous dark canvas feeling

✨ SCROLL-TRIGGERED ANIMATION SYSTEM: comprehensive component architecture
• Created AnimatedTitle.tsx: slide-from-left animation for all section headers
• Created AnimatedCard.tsx: fade + slide up with delay support, scale option for role cards
• Created AnimatedStat.tsx: counter animation with ease-out cubic easing (0→target over 1200ms)
• Enhanced useScrollAnimation.ts: automatic cleanup, better performance with unobserve

📊 FEATURE CARDS: staggered reveal with 100ms delays
• Wrapped all 6 feature cards with AnimatedCard delay={index * 100}
• Planning (0ms) → Portail (100ms) → Réputation (200ms) → Communication (300ms) → Rapports (400ms) → Réserves (500ms)
• Maintains existing hover effects and styling

🔄 HOW-IT-WORKS STEPS: sequential animation with 150ms stagger
• Wrapped each of 4 steps with AnimatedCard delay={index * 150}
• 01 Archi (0ms) → 02 Artisans (150ms) → 03 Client (300ms) → 04 Portfolio (450ms)
• Preserves step numbering, titles, descriptions styling

⚡ ROLE CARDS: scale animation with stagger
• Wrapped Architecte/Artisan/Client cards with AnimatedCard scale={true}
• Delays: 0ms, 100ms, 200ms for smooth sequential scale reveal
• Scale effect: 0.95 → 1.0 with translateY animation

💫 CTA EMAIL SECTION: radial glow effect
• Added AnimatedCard wrapper with radial gradient background
• Background: ''radial-gradient(circle at center, rgba(255,122,61,0.08) 0%, transparent 70%)''
• 24px border radius, 40px vertical padding for enhanced visual impact

🔧 TECHNICAL IMPROVEMENTS:
• All section headers wrapped with AnimatedTitle for consistent slide-in animation
• Stats counter animations: 5h, 3, 0, 118 with proper suffix handling
• Enhanced globals.css with fadeInUp keyframe for hero text
• Zero TypeScript compilation errors, successful build verification
• Landing page bundle: 10.3 kB (+0.43 kB for all animation features)

🎯 IMMERSIVE RESULT:
• Text positioned below animation, no overlap interference
• Complete removal of visual separators for seamless flow
• Comprehensive scroll-triggered animation system
• Professional architectural aesthetic with smooth interactions
• One continuous dark canvas experience achieved

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>")
